B0.description: Baseline approximation: no MMR/source cap, no cross-source neighborhood quota, no multi-query, problem keyword-only.
B0.label: B0

S2.description: B0 + concept MMR reranking and per-source cap.
S2.label: +S2

S3.description: +S2 + source-neighborhood rebalance using the current public quota arguments.
S3.label: +S3
limitations: S3 is measured through public max_same_source_neighbors/min_cross_source arguments; the exact pre-story implementation is not resurrected.

S4.label: +S4
limitations: S4 is separated by max_subqueries=0 vs 3; field quota merge internals are not split into finer-grained toggles.

S5_6.description: +S4 + problem-bank fake embedding store/client for hybrid search.
S5_6.label: +S5/6
limitations: Story 5 and 6 are measured together because embeddings and hybrid ranking form one exposed problem-bank toggle.

caseStudies.reportText: LLM에게 원하는 답을 잘 끌어내려면 지시를 어떻게 줘야 하는지, 출력의 무작위성을 조절하는 설정값들이 무엇을 의미하는지 헷갈린다.

checks: relevance maintained within epsilon=0.02 1/2 required: ndcgAtK
failures: relevance maintained within epsilon=0.02 1/2 required: ndcgAtK

limitations: Actual Gemini API calls are intentionally disabled; all benchmark runs use deterministic fake-hash embeddings.
This report measures retrieval/source distribution, not final answer sentence generation quality.
S3 is measured through public max_same_source_neighbors/min_cross_source arguments; the exact pre-story implementation is not resurrected.
S4 is separated by max_subqueries=0 vs 3; field quota merge internals are not split into finer-grained toggles.
Story 5 and 6 are measured together because embeddings and hybrid ranking form one exposed problem-bank toggle.
